title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.090 - Health officer to furnish copy of law to midwife — secretary of state to print same
text:
210.090.  Health officer to furnish copy of law to midwife — secretary of state to print same. — Every health officer shall furnish a copy of sections 210.070 to 210.100, to each and every person who is known to him to act as midwife or nurse in the city or town for which such health officer is appointed, and the secretary of state shall cause a sufficient number of copies of said sections to be printed, and shall supply the same to such health officers on application.
(RSMo 1939 § 9996) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9126; 1919 § 7341; 1909 § 8322
